_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
specialty: General Surgery, Pediatric Surgery, Obstetrics & Gynecology
clinical_indications: Confirm transformation of a LG to a HG lymphoma (e.g. FL to DLBCL)

ppd_preauth.q: Was the clinical presentation, physical examination ± supporting investigations indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Are the detailed procedure Notes available?
Was the clinical presentation indicative of procedure?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical presentation, physical examination, or supporting investigations not indicative of the procedure.
Detailed clinical notes (vitals, history, symptoms, signs, physical examination, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment) missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
Clinical photograph missing or not applicable without justification at pre-authorization.
Detailed indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Detailed procedure notes missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Histopathological examination report missing at claim submission.
Detailed discharge summary with follow-up advice missing or incomplete at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Fine-needle aspiration biopsy (FNAB) is a safe and minimally invasive outpatient procedure, triaging reactive from neoplastic lymph nodes which require further management/referral, and diagnosing infectious lesions that require treatment.
Indications for FNAB are dependent on the patient, the lymph node and on the diseases prevalent in the population.
